article.title: Get blazing Wi-Fi 7 speeds with a record price drop on the ASUS RT-BE82U Dual-Band Router
article.summary: If you are looking to upgrade your home network, the ASUS RT-BE82U Dual-Band Wi-Fi 7 Router is currently available for just $119, down from $167.99, which means a solid 40% off the normal price. This powerful router delivers ultra-fast speeds of up to 6500 Mbps. It features AI-boosted Smart AiMesh technology for boosted coverage. The router is equipped with five 2.5 GbE ports, optimizing wired connections. It also supports up to three SSIDs for IoT devices and includes features like parental controls and VPN support for enhanced security.
article.title_zh: 以破紀錄低價購買 ASUS RT-BE82U 雙頻路由器享受閃電般的 Wi-Fi 7 速度
article.summary_zh: ASUS RT-BE82U Wi-Fi 7 路由器現以 $119 價格販售，降幅達 40%，提供高達 6500 Mbps 的超快速度。

article.title: Google brings individual hotel price tracking to Search for all your summer travel needs
article.summary: Google is adding a new tool to Search that should allow users to save a little bit of cash on their upcoming summer vacations. more…
article.title_zh: Google 在 Search 中推出單家飯店價格追蹤功能，滿足您的夏季旅遊需求
article.summary_zh: Google 在 Search 新增工具，讓使用者可以追蹤單家飯店的價格，節省夏季假期開支。

article.title: Nvidia’s Huang Says Mythos Shows Need for US-China AI Dialogue
article.summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang said that Anthropic PBC’s Mythos breakthrough shows that the US should seek greater cooperation with China so artificial intelligence researchers in the world’s two largest economies can agree on how to safely use the increasingly powerful technology.
article.title_zh: Nvidia的Huang表示Mythos表明需要美中AI對話
article.summary_zh: Nvidia Corp執行長Jensen Huang表示，Anthropic PBC的Mythos突破表明美國應尋求與中國進一步合作，以便全球兩大經濟體的AI研究人員能就安全使用日益強大的技術達成共識。

article.title: AMD's market cap hits all-time high, Intel hits 25-year high on Agentic AI's insatiable demand for CPUs
article.summary: Demand for CPUs by AI systems is creating positive sentiment and drives AMD and Intel stocks to their highs.
article.title_zh: AMD's market cap hits all-time high, Intel hits 25-year high on Agentic AI's insatiable demand for CPUs
article.summary_zh: Demand for CPUs by AI systems is creating positive sentiment and drives AMD and Intel stocks to their highs.

article.title: NVIDIA導入AI設計晶片　全自動化仍是遙遠目標
article.summary: NVIDIA將人工智慧（AI）全面導入晶片設計流程，其中標準單元庫移植作業原需8名工程師耗時10個月完成，現在只需單一GPU運行NB-Cell系統一夜即可搞定，但離完全自動化還很遙遠。綜合Tom's Hardware、VideoCardz及Computer Weekly報導，NVIDIA科學家Bill...

article.title: Google and Pentagon in talks to run custom AI chips inside classified environments — Google pushes for tight controls for TPUs surrounding use for mass surveillance and autonomous weapons
article.summary: Google is reportedly negotiating with the U.S. Department of Defense to deploy Gemini in classified settings, with the talks covering the addition of GPU racks to Google Distributed Cloud.
article.title_zh: Google 與五角大廈洽談在機密環境中運行自訂 AI 晶片 — Google 力促對 TPU 的嚴格控制以防止大規模監控和自主武器
article.summary_zh: Google 據報正與美國國防部談判在機密環境中部署 Gemini，談判涵蓋向 Google Distributed Cloud 添加 GPU 機櫃。

article.title: Nvidia Helps Make Quantum Computing CEO a Billionaire in Days
article.summary: The founder of quantum computing startup Xanadu Quantum Technologies Ltd. became a billionaire in a matter of days after Nvidia Corp. threw its weight behind the emerging technology.
article.title_zh: Nvidia 幫助量子計算 CEO 在數日內成為十億富翁
article.summary_zh: 量子計算初創公司 Xanadu Quantum Technologies Ltd. 的創始人在 Nvidia Corp. 支持該新興技術後數日內成為十億富翁。

article.title: Alibaba Moves Onto Tencent’s Turf With New AI Model for 3D Video
article.summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. launched a new AI model that can be used to develop games and generate videos simulating the real world, expanding its suite of products to challenge Tencent Holdings Ltd. as it looks to monetize the technology.
article.title_zh: Alibaba 推出新 AI 模型進軍 Tencent 領地打造 3D 影片
article.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴集團推出新 AI 模型，可用於開發遊戲和生成模擬真實世界的影片，擴展其產品組合以挑戰騰訊控股。

article.title: Google AI Mode getting deep Chrome integration on desktop, mobile
article.summary: Like the Gemini app before , Google is now deeply integrating AI Mode with desktop and mobile Chrome. more…
article.title_zh: Google AI Mode getting deep Chrome integration on desktop, mobile
article.summary_zh: Like the Gemini app before , Google is now deeply integrating AI Mode with desktop and mobile Chrome. more…

article.title: Your next Android app might be AI-made, and Google wants it done right
article.summary: Credit: Guest Post / Android Authority TL;DR AI tools have made it easier than ever to build Android apps, but they can often rely on outdated knowledge. Google is now giving AI coding direct agents access to its latest Android developer resources to improve app quality. These changes should lead to better-optimized, more reliable AI-made apps across phones, tablets, foldables, and other Android devices. The way mobile apps are made in our times is very different from how things worked a few years ago. These days, anyone with a good idea can ask ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and the like to write the code for an Android app. There’s very little need for deep coding knowledge or experience.
article.title_zh: Your next Android app might be AI-made, and Google wants it done right
article.summary_zh: Credit: Guest Post / Android Authority TL;DR AI tools have made it easier than ever to build Android apps, but they can often rely on outdated knowledge. These changes should lead to better-optimized, more reliable AI-made apps across phones, tablets, foldables, and other Android devices. The way mobile apps are made in our times is very different from how things worked a few years ago. These days, anyone with a good idea can ask ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and the like to write the code for an Android app. There’s very little need for deep coding knowledge or experience.

article.title: Spotify has redesigned its tablet app, here's what's new
article.summary: Today Spotify has announced that it's revamped its tablet interface - for both Android tablets and iPads. The "new app experience" is tailored for tablets from the ground up, and is "designed to make listening, watching, and discovery feel more natural on larger screens", according to the official press release. The redesigned tablet UI isn't just a scaled up phone version as before. Instead, it's designed to take advantage of the extra screen real estate, "so you can browse and discover new favorites right alongside what you're already playing". The UI...
article.title_zh: Spotify 重新設計平板應用程式
article.summary_zh: Spotify 宣佈推出平板介面改版，同時支援 Android 平板和 iPad，新應用體驗針對大屏幕優化，讓聆聽、觀看和發現內容更自然。
